faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in wool clothing, silk fabrics, or upholstery; silky webbing in closet corners; beige or cream-colored larvae in stored garments; and small moths flying around bedrooms or closets. You may also notice casings or cocoons on fabric surfaces. If you spot any of these signs in your Floral Park home, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Floral Park typically range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of affected areas. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand exactly what treatment your home requires.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Floral Park residents. Contact us before noon, and we can typically schedule a technician to your Floral Park property the same day.

faqs.question: Are your clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.
